message:
🌱 Add alertmanager: alertmanager-config.yaml file for pagerduty_configs.details mission (#1725)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-2477-alertmanager-config-yaml-file-for-pagerduty-configs-details-do",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: alertmanager-config.yaml file for pagerduty_configs.details does not respect EventApi v2 spec",
+    "description": "alertmanager-config.yaml file for pagerduty_configs.details does not respect EventApi v2 spec. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current alertmanager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
**What did you do?**
Generate a nested object for pagerduty_configs.details field inside alertmanager-config.yaml

**What did you expect to see?**
amtool should not fail and alertmanager must allow nested objects as it's compatible with pagerduty"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for alertmanager-config.yaml file for pagerduty_configs.details…",
+        "description": "This change allows nested key/value pair in pageduty configuration.

Events API V1 supports an object in `details` field:
https://developer.pagerduty.com/docs/send-v1-event#parameters

Events API V2 supports an object in `payload.custom_details`
```yaml
global:
  resolve_timeout: "10m"

templates:
  - '/etc/alertmanager/secrets/pagerduty.integration.key.tmpl'

route:
  group_by: [ '...' ]
  group_wait: 30s
  group_interval: 5m
  repeat_interval: 12h
  receiver: 'black-hole'

  routes:
    - match_re:
        severity: "warning|critical"
      receiver: "all"

inhibit_rules:
  - source_match:
      severity: 'critical'
    target_match:
      severity: 'warning'
    equal: [ 'alertname' ]

receivers:
  - name: "all"
    pagerduty_configs:
      - routing_key: '{{ template "pagerduty.integration.key" . }}'
        details:
          firing:    
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "alertmanager-config.yaml file for pagerduty_configs.details…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This change allows nested key/value pair in pageduty configuration.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "global:
  resolve_timeout: "10m"

templates:
  - '/etc/alertmanager/secrets/pagerduty.integration.key.tmpl'

route:
  group_by: [ '...' ]
  group_wait: 30s
  group_interval: 5m
  repeat_interval: 12h
  receiver: 'black-hole'

  routes:
    - match_re:
        severity: "warning|critical"
      receiver: "all"

inhibit_rules:
  - source_match:
      severity: 'critical'
    target_match:
      severity: 'warning'
    equal: [ 'alertname' ]

receivers:
  - name: "all"
    pagerduty_configs:
      - routing_key: '{{ template "pagerduty.integration.key" . }}'
        details:
          firing:       '{{ template "pagerduty.default.instances" .Alerts.Firing }}'
          resolved:     '{{ template "pagerduty.default.instances" .Alerts.Resolved }}'
          num_firing:   '{{ .Alerts.Firing | le",
+        "level=error ts=2021-02-05T10:57:07.101Z caller=coordinator.go:124 component=configuration msg="Loading configuration file failed" file=/etc/alertmanager/config/
alertmanager.yaml err="yaml: unmarshal errors:\n  line 91: cannot unmarshal !!seq into string"",
+        "curl -X POST -d '{"routing_key": "XXXX", "event_action": "trigger", "payload": {"summary": "one alert", "source": "curl", "severity": "critical", "custom_details": { "toto": ["hello", "hoho"]}}}' https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
